clips.title: The Doorway
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, composed grade. A dim room, an open doorway leading to a bright sunlit room beyond. A frame-within-a-frame shot: the doorway forms an inner frame around a person standing in the lit room beyond, framed by the dark door surround. A person in casual clothes. Bright inner room, dark frame, 40mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Window
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm grade. The exterior of a cozy cafe at dusk, a large window glowing warmly. A frame-within-a-frame shot: the window frames a person seated inside at a table, the window edges forming an inner frame around them. A person in a sweater. Warm interior glow, cool dusk outside, 50mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Arch
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, grand grade. An old stone archway opening onto a sunlit courtyard beyond. A frame-within-a-frame shot: the stone arch forms an inner frame around a person standing in the bright courtyard, framed by the dark arch. A person in a long coat. Bright courtyard, shadowed arch, 35mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Tunnel
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A dark pedestrian tunnel opening onto a bright city street at the far end. A frame-within-a-frame shot: the tunnel mouth forms an inner frame around a person standing in the bright opening, silhouetted, framed by the dark tunnel. A person in a jacket. Bright opening, dark tunnel frame, 35mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirror Frame
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. A dim hallway with a large ornate framed mirror on the wall. A frame-within-a-frame shot: the mirror's ornate frame forms an inner frame around a person's reflection captured within it. A person in smart attire. Warm hallway light, framed reflection, 50mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Foliage
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, lush grade. A garden with an opening in dense green foliage revealing a person beyond. A frame-within-a-frame shot: leafy branches in the soft-focus foreground form a natural inner frame around a person standing sharp in the clearing beyond. A person in light clothes. Warm dappled light, green natural frame, 50mm, frame within a frame. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
